description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, featuring a plump sausage nestled inside a soft, slightly golden-brown bun. A generous zigzag of yellow mustard is drizzled along the length of the sausage, adding a vibrant contrast to the warm tones of the bread and meat. The bun appears fluffy and lightly textured, enveloping the sausage on both sides but leaving the top exposed for the condiment. The sausage itself is smooth and cylindrical, with a natural reddish-brown color typical of cooked frankfurters. There are no visible grill marks or additional toppings such as onions or relish. The hot dog is unwrapped, with no packaging or tray present, making it ready to eat as a street food snack.
description: A plump sausage in a soft bun, topped with a zigzag of yellow mustard and no visible packaging. The hot dog is unwrapped and ready to eat.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the hot dog with mustard on top and the bun cradling the sausage.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the zigzag mustard pattern and the exposed sausage within the bun.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the bun and sausage with mustard.
description_view_3: Top-down view from the opposite end, again emphasizing the mustard and sausage exposure.
